title: On Austin — the arrival reflection (alone, broke, ambition, Cam frustration, Hyde Park gym pitch)
html:
On Austin — the arrival reflection (alone, broke, ambition, Cam frustration, Hyde Park gym pitch)

Source: 2025-09-20 Google Doc. Yahir's first solo reflection ~1 week into Austin — mom has just left, Cam isn't there yet, financial margin razor-thin. Closes with a draft cover letter to Hyde Park Gym.

TL;DR

  • The arrival realization: "Well I'm here. Everything has worked out pretty well, some even better tbh. I came here on the 'say yes and figure it out later' mentality and now we are in the midst of it."
  • Internal monologue noted as crisp: "This happens when I'm alone and am focused / locked in."
  • Game framing: "This is a game, this entire thing feels like a game. Make it to the top, have fun doing it, survive the potholes and fear nothing."
  • Financial reality: "the margin of error, specifically the financial margin of error is immensely thin. We have about 1 month of savings." Plan: pick up another job, start DoorDashing in short-term.
  • Self-instruction: "remember the reason for you being here, to take risks. To live broke in the face of ambitions and possibility. Do not forget that and press down on the pedal so hard you risk crashing."
  • The loneliness flag: "I am going to be lonely, immensely. I have even played with the possibility of hopping on Tinder / Hinge to meet people. Fill the void of isolation with random girls, fuck them in the apartment, hang out with SOMEONE."
  • The vetting heuristic (the family-mirror filter): "if you wouldn't be alright presenting her to your family and friends then maybe don't fuck her. But then again, a big booty / titted bitch is very fuckable, but not necessary someone that I want to show to my parents and write home about."
  • Re: Keannah — "my most sexually active experience with Keannah have currently formed my sexual desires of a bigger girl. Some one that has cellulite and would look weird when they run." — first explicit Keannah reference.
  • Cam frustration (sharper than August's IRL Lore Tab 7):
    • "I hold slight resentment for him not being here because he doesn't know the effort that you have put into actualizing this move."
    • The November ultimatum-questions Yahir is preparing: what's happening with Dudley House, what's with Talia, what will you contribute short-term, how do I know you're locked in vs short-term burst, are you truly ready, you know this is my apartment right?
  • The closing: "All in all, i am now alone. My mom left today, my brother and dad are back in Oregon. My Friends are in Corvallis. This is a new wrld. This is a new life. Lets embrace it, you are special and trust that the dots will connect."
  • Hyde Park Gym cover letter draft (last paragraph): bodybuilding-fitness culture pitch, "I graduated from Oregon State University with a degree in computer science, but my passion is in health. I have combined both and make mobile apps for people who love fitness as much as I do." Goes for the Hyde Park Gym employment.

Pattern observed

The arrival-trilogy bookend to the May plan and the August packlist. Yahir's voice in this note is the alone-and-locked-in voice — most disciplined version of Yahir thinking out loud. The "internal monologue is very crisp when alone" line is self-revealing about how he writes best.

The family-mirror-as-vetting-filter for hookups is an under-appreciated Yahir-heuristic (would I show this person to my family?) — same logic appears later in the Emily misalignment doc (would she fit the long-term vision?). Both function as decision-filters via projecting forward to family-context.

The Cam ultimatum-questions are the prophetic preview — by August Yahir was annoyed; by September he's drafting interrogation questions; by 2026 Cam isn't part of the Rankett operation at all (Diddles is the named operating partner instead). The friendship-becomes-business-strain arc plays out across these documents.

Key quote

"Live broke in the face of ambitions and possibility... press down on the pedal so hard you risk crashing."

Open questions

  • Did Yahir get the Hyde Park Gym job? (Per 2025 10 20 quality resume: he's working at NaviWell, not Hyde Park. So likely no.)
  • Cam's "Talia" — first mention. Cam's girlfriend?
  • "Dudley House" — the Corvallis house Cam was in?
  • The Tinder/Hinge consideration — did he go through with it? (Per the late Oct Emily wishlist: by Oct 28, he's focused on Emily, so maybe the Tinder phase was brief or skipped.)
